recommendations.title: Torch Song Trilogy
recommendations.overview: Arnold Beckoff is looking for love and acceptance, but as a gay man working as a female impersonator in 1970s New York City, neither come easily. After a series of heartaches, Arnold believes he has found the love of his life in Alan, and the couple

recommendations.title: Rich and Poor

recommendations.title: Crazy About Her
recommendations.overview: After a magical night together, Adri voluntarily turns himself into the psychiatric institution where Carla lives.

recommendations.title: Advantages of Travelling by Train
recommendations.overview: After interning her insane husband in a remote psychiatric hospital, book editor Helga Pato returns home by train, where she meets a mysterious man who identifies himself as a psychiatrist.

recommendations.title: Barefoot
recommendations.overview: The "black sheep" son of a wealthy family meets a young psychiatric patient who's been raised in isolation her entire life. He takes the naive young woman home for his brother's wedding an improbable romance blooms, as she impresses everyone with her

recommendations.title: Berlin Calling
recommendations.overview: A man tours clubs around the globe with his manager and girlfriend. On the eve of their largest album release he is admitted to a psychiatric clinic after overdosing at a gig.

recommendations.title: She's So Lovely
recommendations.overview: After being released from a psychiatric institution, a man tries to redeem himself in the eyes of his now-ex wife from the events that led up to his incarceration.

recommendations.title: Still Waiting...
recommendations.overview: After Shenaniganz loses all its hottest waitresses to new competitor Ta-Ta's Wing Shack -- where the scantily clad wait staff earns bigger tips -- the Shenaniganz staff aims to give Ta-Ta's its just desserts.

recommendations.title: Orphan: First Kill
